module.name: funnel
module.description: A funnel chart: stages narrowing top to bottom, each with value and auto-computed conversion % from the previous stage. One stage per section, "Label | value".
module.aiSpec:
A FUNNEL chart for conversion / pipeline stages — each stage's width shrinks with its value, and the conversion rate between stages is computed automatically.
Body: split the sections with `<!-- @ -->`, one stage per section written `Label | value` (biggest value first). Values may include commas/spaces (e.g. `10,000`). Widths are relative to the largest value.
When NOT to use: for arbitrary category comparisons use @barchart; the funnel implies a shrinking sequence.
Parameters: - `color` : base color; stages fade downward from it. Default var(--accent-color). - `percent` : first | previous | none — show each stage as a percent of the FIRST stage, of the PREVIOUS stage (default), or hide the percentages. - `showvalues` : true/false — print the raw value on each stage. Default true. - `minwidth` : smallest stage width as a percent (keeps tiny stages readable). Default 18. Range 0–100. - `gap` : vertical gap between stages in px. Default 6. Range 0–40. - `radius` : stage corner radius in px. Default 8. Range 0–30.
<!-- @funnel percent: previous, showvalues: false, gap: 10 --> Visitors | 10000 <!-- @ --> Sign-ups | 2400 <!-- @ --> Paid | 480 <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Base color
param.desc: Base color; stages fade downward from it.

param.name: percent
param.label: Percentage vs
param.desc: Show each stage as % of the previous stage, the first stage, or hide.

param.name: showvalues
param.label: Show values
param.desc: Print the raw value on each stage.

param.name: minwidth
param.label: Min stage width (%)
param.desc: Smallest stage width, so tiny stages stay readable.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius (px)
param.desc: Corner radius of the stage shapes.

snippet.label: Funnel (conversion)
snippet.description: Narrowing stages with auto conversion percentages.
